description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a casual short-sleeve t-shirt with printed text on the front and back, paired with fitted pants. He is also wearing low-top sneakers and has a neatly groomed short hairstyle. The figure features a full beard and is accessorized with sunglasses. The posture is upright, with arms relaxed and slightly away from the body. The overall appearance is modern and suitable for an urban environment, such as a city street or park.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a beard, sunglasses, t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face with sunglasses, beard, t-shirt with chest print, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, sunglasses, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt with a large print on the upper back, and the back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, beard, sunglasses, and the right side of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants with low-top sneakers and sunglasses
